title: pulassarium pilosum
intro: Pulassarium pilosum, also known as the "Hairy Burdock," is a biennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pulassarium pilosum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, tincture, or dried root to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
